chemo.name: Etoposide
notes: Use non-PVC tubing if per hospital policy

chemo.name: Cytarabine (Ara-C)
notes: Steroid eye drops may be considered
Monitor for fever, rash, chest pain (cytarabine syndrome)

nursingNotes: Indication: Relapsed/refractory AML requiring salvage therapy
Expect profound pancytopenia — daily CBC monitoring needed
High infection risk — monitor temperature and start broad antibiotics early
Assess for TLS (tumor lysis syndrome) and maintain hydration
Monitor cardiac function with Mitoxantrone (baseline + symptoms)
Watch for mucositis and manage early
Etoposide may cause hypotension — monitor during infusion
references: Zhong et al., MEC salvage therapy review, 2024
